title: Heaps, Priority Queues, and Scheduling
description: Schedule incidents by urgency, arrival, and changing operational priority. Learners cumulatively produce a stable priority scheduler with heap invariants through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Relate complete-tree shape to array indices and parent-child heap order.
Trace sift-up, sift-down, push, pop, replace, and heapify costs.
Add stable tie breakers without comparing unrelated payload objects.
